race.comment: Keen to see SMOOTH CHINO (6) on his return after coming on impressively last campaign, culminating in a dominant win in the Black Heart Bart. He's still unbeaten and looks a genuine Quokka threat. He's impressed at the trials coming in and he can return with a bang in the Roma Cup. OSCAR'S FORTUNE (1) won the Rock Magic in a photo finish when jumping the $2.50 favourite off a freshen. He's fitter for that effort and he has enough speed to roll across from out wide. Wouldn't surprise to see him go on with the job. WEST STAR (4) ran up to his form in Victoria without featuring. Back home in WA now and his recent trial was very good. Can lob just off the speed and make a statement with CJP in the saddle. LUANA MISS (9) is an exciting 3YO taking her place here after tackling the Winterbottom before the break. Include. ROPE THEM IN (2) looks ready to fire first-up with two trials under his belt, the latest behind SMOOTH CHINO. Big chance.
